title: Single-cell epigenomics and spatiotemporal transcriptomics reveal human cerebellar development.
author: Zhong S Wang M Huang L Chen Y Ge Y Zhang J Shi Y Dong H Zhou X Wang B Lu T Jing X Lu Y Zhang J Wang X Wu Q
content: S-EPMC10665552 PMC10665552 Single-cell epigenomics and spatiotemporal transcriptomics reveal human cerebellar development. Human cerebellar development is orchestrated by molecular regulatory networks to achieve cytoarchitecture and coordinate motor and cognitive functions. Here, we combined
